ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (Male/Female) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the patient resides */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom (e.g., fever, cough) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptom_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symptom */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., Mild, Severe) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the symptom started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the symptom ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptom_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptom_records_symptom_id FOREIGN KEY ("symptom_id") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (Positive/Negative) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., PCR, antigen) */,
  "testing_facility" TEXT /* Facility where the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treating doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the hospital is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hospital */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was discharged */,
  "admission_reason" TEXT /* Reason for admission */,
  "discharge_status" TEXT /* Status at discharge (e.g., Recovered, Deceased) */,
  "discharge_comments" TEXT /* Comments at discharge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nurses" (
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nurse */,
  "nurse_name" TEXT /* Full name of the nurse */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department of the nurse */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the nurse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nurse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nurses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_doctors" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_nurses" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nurse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "nurse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
